headline: NVR's Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Homebuilding Revenues Down Y/Y
summary: NVR's Q1 EPS and revenues miss estimates as settlements fall 22% on a 15% lower opening backlog; shares drop 4.7%.

headline: Why Is KB Home (KBH) Up 6.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: KB Home (KBH) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: PulteGroup Stock Down on Earnings Q1 Miss, Revenues Beat on Orders
summary: PHM's shares slip after Q1 earnings miss as margins shrink and profits fall, despite a revenue beat driven by steady orders and community growth.
